prompt: Dramatic dark studio, purple-violet light beam cuts through fog, bold title 'EV Calculator' materializes in mid-air, cinematic slow push-in, premium Apple-reveal atmosphere, deep navy background.
Sleek smartphone floats on dark surface, finger taps price field showing '100', violet glow pulses around input, smooth macro close-up, soft bokeh, premium fintech aesthetic.
Smartphone held at elegant angle, thumb glides to '期权产品' tab, interface transitions with fluid animation, cool violet highlight illuminates selection, cinematic side-lit close-up.
Hand returns to smartphone, finger taps '线性产品' tab with precision, glowing purple accent activates, screen reflects on glossy surface below, smooth slow-motion close-up.
Smartphone screen scrolls down revealing probability distribution panel, data fields illuminate sequentially in violet, dramatic upward tilt camera move, dark gradient background, premium feel.
Smartphone screen flashes calculated EV score, bold glowing number emerges center-frame, violet light blooms outward dramatically, slow push-in macro lens, triumphant cinematic reveal moment.
Clean matte dark card, 'EV Calculator' logo appears with elegant fade, tagline types in below, violet underline sweeps across, 'Try it free' pulses softly, premium brand outro.
